name: sauerkraut
identity: A preserved food item made from fermented vegetables, specifically arctic dock, fireweed shoots, and wild mustard, salted and stored in ceramic crocks. It is a vital new source of nutrients for the tribe.
current_status: Ready for consumption and serving as a key part of the tribe's sustenance following a successful fermentation process.

description.value: Fermented vegetable dish made from arctic dock, fireweed shoots, and wild mustard, salted and stored in ceramic crocks.

volatile_state.current_activity: Being prepared using cabbage, salt, and a press. The player is venturing outside to gather ingredients.
volatile_state.location: Near the preparation area, outside the longhouse in a snow-dusted landscape.
volatile_state.condition: Active and engaged in food preparation and foraging.
